mapper.insert: INSERT INTO interaction_comment(comment_id, post_id, user_id, root_id, parent_id, reply_to_id, content_id, status, like_count, create_time, update_time) VALUES(#{commentId}, #{postId}, #{userId}, #{rootId}, #{parentId}, #{replyToId}, #{contentId}, #{status}, #{likeCount}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT comment_id, post_id, user_id, root_id, status, like_count FROM interaction_comment WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} LIMIT 1

SELECT comment_id, post_id, user_id, root_id, parent_id, reply_to_id, content_id, status, like_count, create_time, update_time FROM interaction_comment WHERE comment_id IN
#{id}

SELECT comment_id, post_id, user_id, root_id, status, like_count FROM interaction_comment WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND root_id IS NULL AND status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC, comment_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
